title: Advice Surgeries | The Rt Hon Dr Andrew Murrison MP
meta_description: Andrew holds regular advice surgeries in South West Wiltshire, including sessions at his constituency office and drop-in clinics around the constituency.These are for residents to raise issues and express concerns.To book an appointment, or find out when the next drop-in session is, please call Andrew's office on 01225 358 584
headings: h3: The Rt Hon Dr Andrew Murrison MP South West Wiltshire
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries | The Rt Hon Dr Andrew Murrison MP Skip to main content Rt Hon Dr Andrew Murrison MP South West Wiltshire Main navigation Home About Andrew Andrew's blog News Campaigns In Parliament Surveys Contact Rt Hon Dr Andrew Murrison MP South West Wiltshire Advice Surgeries Tweet Andrew holds regular advice surgeries in South West Wiltshire, including sessions at his constituency office and within the constituency. These are for residents to raise issues and express concerns. To book an appointment please call Andrew's office on 01225 358584 . Alternatively, you can write to Andrew at: House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA or email: [email protected] Contact Advice Surgeries My policy on offensive correspondence and social media The Rt Hon Dr Andrew Murrison MP South West Wiltshire Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Andrew Advice Surgeries In Parliament South West Wiltshire This website is funded by the Independent Parliamentary Standards Authority (IPSA) for the purpose of assisting The Rt Hon Andrew Murrison MP in the performance of his parliamentary duties.
